TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_hitay_nu_misebengay_tu_labii, title = hitay_nu_misebengay_tu_labii, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/hitay_nu_misebengay_tu_labii} }

S.FORM: hitay nu misebengay tu labii(u Amilika a kumu: Night's Watch, u Hulam a kamu:ŚģąŚ§úšļļŤĽćŚúė) sa, u nisangaan nu misulitay ci George Raymond Richard Martin, u cacay a kaput nu misebengay tu caay kau nu tahed a maudipay. nadipaan nu heni misebeng ku heni tu satabakiay a lilin i nu amisan, milawa' tu caay kau taheday a aadupen medebung tu Westelo a lala'. yu i kasumamadan sa, u sasatanaya'ay a tabii nanutawya, idaw ku cacayay a hitay nu wawa nu kilakilangan atu saayaway a tademaw, namalpacaw ku heni tu salengacay a di'tu. ahayni sadikud milawa' tu selengacay a di'tu mudebeng tu pituway a kanatal. mukeliday tu katuuday ci Pulanden Stak ku misanga'ay, malingatu patideng tu satabakiay a lilin(malilinay a luma'). malilinay a luma' nu heni aenengan nu heni namakaytipan tu nuwalian, idaw ku malilinay a luma' nu aydaay. nutipan a sangaw a malilinay a luma'(Amilika a kamu: Westwatch-by-the-Bridge) cacekulan nu adingu'(Amilika a kamu: The Shadow Tower) idaw ku tusaay a lasubu a tademaw nu hitay itida misimaw hananay. salabiay a malilinay a luma' (amlika a kam: The Nightfort, u Hulam a kamu:ťē∑Ś§úŚ†°) u satenesay a malilinay a luma' nu hitay nu misebengay tu labii hananay. u lumeni'ay a panan, u cacayay a nisanga'an nu selengacay a kilang; u misebengay sa ku babuhatan, taneng tu pacumud i satabakiay a lilin. u lumen'ay a malilinay a luma' (Amilika a kamu: Castle Black, Hulam a kamu:ťĽĎŚüéŚ†°) u satabakiay a malilinay a luma' nu aydaay i labu nu kungku. lalangawan sapakaput u kakasenengan a tademaw nu heni malalitin tu ihekaay atu zumaay a natinengan u nisulitan ni Padakaw Lami' 2019
S.PHON: ńßitaj nu mis…ôb…ôŇčaj tu r~…ĺabii(u amir~…ĺika a kumu: nigńßt Ē~ °s wat ¶ńß, u ńßur~…ĺam a kamu:*****) sa, u nisaŇčaan nu misur~…ĺitaj ¶i g…ôorg…ô *ajmond *i ¶ńßard martin, u ¶a ¶aj a kaput nu mis…ôb…ôŇčaj tu ¶aaj kau nu tańß…ôd a maudipaj. nadipaan nu ńß…ôni mis…ôb…ôŇč ku ńß…ôni tu satabakiaj a r~…ĺir~…ĺin i nu amisan, mir~…ĺawa Ē~ ° tu ¶aaj kau tańß…ôdaj a aadup…ôn m…ôd…ôbuŇč tu w…ôst…ôr~…ĺo a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. ju i kasumamadan sa, u sasatanaja Ē~ °aj a tabii nanutawja, idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj a ńßitaj nu wawa nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan atu saajawaj a tad…ômaw, namar~…ĺpa ¶aw ku ńß…ôni tu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a di Ē~ °tu. ańßajni sadikud mir~…ĺawa Ē~ ° tu s…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a di Ē~ °tu mud…ôb…ôŇč tu pituwaj a kanatar~…ĺ. muk…ôr~…ĺidaj tu katuudaj ¶i pur~…ĺand…ôn stak ku misaŇča Ē~ °aj, mar~…ĺiŇčatu patid…ôŇč tu satabakiaj a r~…ĺir~…ĺin(mar~…ĺir~…ĺinaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °). mar~…ĺir~…ĺinaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ńß…ôni a…ôn…ôŇčan nu ńß…ôni namakajtipan tu nuwar~…ĺian, idaw ku mar~…ĺir~…ĺinaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ajdaaj. nutipan a saŇčaw a mar~…ĺir~…ĺinaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °(amir~…ĺika a kamu: w…ôstwat ¶ńß-bj-tńß…ô-bridg…ô) ¶a ¶…ôkur~…ĺan nu adiŇču Ē~ °(amir~…ĺika a kamu: tńß…ô sńßadow tow…ôr) idaw ku tusaaj a r~…ĺasubu a tad…ômaw nu ńßitaj itida misimaw ńßananaj. sar~…ĺabiaj a mar~…ĺir~…ĺinaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° (amr~…ĺika a kam: tńß…ô nigńßtfort, u ńßur~…ĺam a kamu:***) u sat…ôn…ôsaj a mar~…ĺir~…ĺinaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ńßitaj nu mis…ôb…ôŇčaj tu r~…ĺabii ńßananaj. u r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj a panan, u ¶a ¶ajaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an nu s…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a kir~…ĺaŇč; u mis…ôb…ôŇčaj sa ku babuńßatan, tan…ôŇč tu pa ¶umud i satabakiaj a r~…ĺir~…ĺin. u r~…ĺum…ôn Ē~ °aj a mar~…ĺir~…ĺinaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° (amir~…ĺika a kamu: ¶astr~…ĺ…ô br~…ĺa ¶k, ńßur~…ĺam a kamu:***) u satabakiaj a mar~…ĺir~…ĺinaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ajdaaj i r~…ĺabu nu kuŇčku. r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan sapakaput u kakas…ôn…ôŇčan a tad…ômaw nu ńß…ôni mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkaaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan u nisur~…ĺitan ni padakaw r~…ĺami Ē~ ° ****
S.FORM: hitay nu misebengay tu labii(u Amilika a kumu: Night's Watch, u Hulam a kamu:ŚģąŚ§úšļļŤĽćŚúė) sa, u nisangaan nu misulitay ci George Raymond Richard Martin, u cacay a kaput nu misebengay tu caay kau nu tahed a maudipay. nadipaan nu heni misebeng ku heni tu satabakiay a lilin i nu amisan, milawa' tu caay kau taheday a aadupen medebung tu Westelo a lala'. yu i kasumamadan sa, u sasatanaya'ay a tabii nanutawya, idaw ku cacayay a hitay nu wawa nu kilakilangan atu saayaway a tademaw, namalpacaw ku heni tu salengacay a di'tu. ahayni sadikud milawa' tu selengacay a di'tu mudebeng tu pituway a kanatal. mukeliday tu katuuday ci Pulanden Stak ku misanga'ay, malingatu patideng tu satabakiay a lilin(malilinay a luma'). malilinay a luma' nu heni aenengan nu heni namakaytipan tu nuwalian, idaw ku malilinay a luma' nu aydaay. nutipan a sangaw a malilinay a luma'(Amilika a kamu: Westwatch-by-the-Bridge) cacekulan nu adingu'(Amilika a kamu: The Shadow Tower) idaw ku tusaay a lasubu a tademaw nu hitay itida misimaw hananay. salabiay a malilinay a luma' (amlika a kam: The Nightfort, u Hulam a kamu:ťē∑Ś§úŚ†°) u satenesay a malilinay a luma' nu hitay nu misebengay tu labii hananay. u lumeni'ay a panan, u cacayay a nisanga'an nu selengacay a kilang; u misebengay sa ku babuhatan, taneng tu pacumud i satabakiay a lilin. u lumen'ay a malilinay a luma' (Amilika a kamu: Castle Black, Hulam a kamu:ťĽĎŚüéŚ†°) u satabakiay a malilinay a luma' nu aydaay i labu nu kungku. lalangawan sapakaput u kakasenengan a tademaw nu heni malalitin tu ihekaay atu zumaay a natinengan u nisulitan ni Padakaw Lami' 2019
S.PHON: ńßitaj nu mis…ôb…ôŇčaj tu r~…ĺabii(u amir~…ĺika a kumu: nigńßt Ē~ °s wat ¶ńß, u ńßur~…ĺam a kamu:*****) sa, u nisaŇčaan nu misur~…ĺitaj ¶i g…ôorg…ô *ajmond *i ¶ńßard martin, u ¶a ¶aj a kaput nu mis…ôb…ôŇčaj tu ¶aaj kau nu tańß…ôd a maudipaj. nadipaan nu ńß…ôni mis…ôb…ôŇč ku ńß…ôni tu satabakiaj a r~…ĺir~…ĺin i nu amisan, mir~…ĺawa Ē~ ° tu ¶aaj kau tańß…ôdaj a aadup…ôn m…ôd…ôbuŇč tu w…ôst…ôr~…ĺo a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. ju i kasumamadan sa, u sasatanaja Ē~ °aj a tabii nanutawja, idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj a ńßitaj nu wawa nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan atu saajawaj a tad…ômaw, namar~…ĺpa ¶aw ku ńß…ôni tu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a di Ē~ °tu. ańßajni sadikud mir~…ĺawa Ē~ ° tu s…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a di Ē~ °tu mud…ôb…ôŇč tu pituwaj a kanatar~…ĺ. muk…ôr~…ĺidaj tu katuudaj ¶i pur~…ĺand…ôn stak ku misaŇča Ē~ °aj, mar~…ĺiŇčatu patid…ôŇč tu satabakiaj a r~…ĺir~…ĺin(mar~…ĺir~…ĺinaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °). mar~…ĺir~…ĺinaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ńß…ôni a…ôn…ôŇčan nu ńß…ôni namakajtipan tu nuwar~…ĺian, idaw ku mar~…ĺir~…ĺinaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ajdaaj. nutipan a saŇčaw a mar~…ĺir~…ĺinaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °(amir~…ĺika a kamu: w…ôstwat ¶ńß-bj-tńß…ô-bridg…ô) ¶a ¶…ôkur~…ĺan nu adiŇču Ē~ °(amir~…ĺika a kamu: tńß…ô sńßadow tow…ôr) idaw ku tusaaj a r~…ĺasubu a tad…ômaw nu ńßitaj itida misimaw ńßananaj. sar~…ĺabiaj a mar~…ĺir~…ĺinaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° (amr~…ĺika a kam: tńß…ô nigńßtfort, u ńßur~…ĺam a kamu:***) u sat…ôn…ôsaj a mar~…ĺir~…ĺinaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ńßitaj nu mis…ôb…ôŇčaj tu r~…ĺabii ńßananaj. u r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj a panan, u ¶a ¶ajaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an nu s…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a kir~…ĺaŇč; u mis…ôb…ôŇčaj sa ku babuńßatan, tan…ôŇč tu pa ¶umud i satabakiaj a r~…ĺir~…ĺin. u r~…ĺum…ôn Ē~ °aj a mar~…ĺir~…ĺinaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° (amir~…ĺika a kamu: ¶astr~…ĺ…ô br~…ĺa ¶k, ńßur~…ĺam a kamu:***) u satabakiaj a mar~…ĺir~…ĺinaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu ajdaaj i r~…ĺabu nu kuŇčku. r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan sapakaput u kakas…ôn…ôŇčan a tad…ômaw nu ńß…ôni mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu ińß…ôkaaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan u nisur~…ĺitan ni padakaw r~…ĺami Ē~ ° ****
